title: Tiny Pickup Animation
description: Minecraft mod that improves default Minecraft item pickup animation
body:
## Tiny Pickup Animation

Are you bored of Minecraft's default pickup animation? Well, no more: this simple mod updates this feature replacing it with more modern, fancier animation. Hope you will like this creation. _Enjoy!_

![New v1.1.0 Update Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae311675cdb0bfd436877b49801aafe565dc1be_0.webp)

_**==📢DISCORD SERVER (TEST)📢==**_

All the feedback, questions, suggestions can go into this server:
[https://discord.gg/BdxuyD7ZwU](https://discord.gg/BdxuyD7ZwU)

![Mod Preview1](https://i.imgur.com/5pUxh0G.gif)

![Mod Preview2](https://i.imgur.com/VIRLsJa.gif)

**Features:**
- replaces the default pickup animation with a smoother pop-up style animation for hotbar slots
- adds the same animation when picking up items with the inventory open
- adds the same pop-up animation for crafting output in the 2x2 inventory crafting grid
- compatible with Minecraft 1.20, 1.21, 26.1

**Future Plans:**
- add the same pop-up animation for the 3x3 crafting table output slot

My YouTube channel:
[https://www.youtube.com/@cat_metalhead](https://www.youtube.com/@cat_metalhead)

**Installation:**

1. Download the mod file (.jar)
2. **Make sure you have Fabric Loader installed**
3. Copy the downloaded .jar mod file into the mods folder
4. Launch Minecraft using the Fabric profile
5. Enjoy!
